{
  "claims": [
    "Hydrogen energy will be an important part of California's clean energy future.",
    "Exciting new technologies in the hydrogen sector will pave the way for zero emissions vehicles and transportation in California.",
    "Investments in hydrogen infrastructure and clean transportation programs are being advocated for in the state Legislature.",
    "California has an ambitious goal of achieving 100 percent zero emissions vehicles in in-state sales of passenger cars and trucks by 2035.",
    "Meeting the goal of 100 percent zero emissions vehicles will effect real changes on the ground for California's environment and economy."
